base/src/main/java/atlantafx/base/contro.general_idea: Add class-level Javadoc explaining the purpose of BehaviorSkinBase as a compatibility layer.
base/src/main/java/atlantafx/base/contro.after:
/** * Base implementation class for defining the visual representation of user * interface controls that need to handle platform events and therefore can take * advantage of using the Behavior API. * *

Note: This is an excerpt of the private Behavior API from the JavaFX codebase. * It serves as a compatibility layer for implementing certain controls, although it * can also be useful for new controls. */

Replace internal TreeItem usage with a custom BreadCrumbItem class to support position-aware styling (first/last) and decouple from JavaFX TreeItem specifics.

base/src/main/java/atlantafx/base/contro.general_idea: Update selectedCrumb property and related methods to use the new BreadCrumbItem type instead of TreeItem.
Change crumb factory to produce ButtonBase (specifically Hyperlink) instead of custom shaped Button, simplifying visual representation.
base/src/main/java/atlantafx/base/contro.before: private final Callback<TreeItem<T>, Button> defaultCrumbNodeFactory = crumb -> new BreadCrumbButton(...);

base/src/main/java/atlantafx/base/contro.general_idea: Add a divider factory property to allow customization of the separators between breadcrumbs.
Remove the custom BreadCrumbButton class which used Path shapes for arrow styling, as it is no longer used.
base/src/main/java/atlantafx/base/contro.before: public static class BreadCrumbButton extends Button { ... private Path createButtonShape() { ... } }

base/src/main/java/atlantafx/base/contro.general_idea: Add explicit size constraints to the Breadcrumbs control to ensure it sizes correctly based on content.
Update imports to reflect the removal of shape-related classes and addition of Hyperlink/Label for new default factories.
Replace TreeItem with custom BreadCrumbItem model to support first/last state tracking and decouple from JavaFX TreeItem.
base/src/main/java/atlantafx/base/contro.why_exists: The code relies on BreadCrumbItem methods like isFirst(), isLast(), and setFirst/setLast which do not exist on TreeItem, causing compile errors.

base/src/main/java/atlantafx/base/contro.general_idea: Replace Button with ButtonBase for crumb nodes to allow more flexible control types.
base/src/main/java/atlantafx/base/contro.why_exists: The factory now returns ButtonBase, and the code assigns it to ButtonBase variables; using Button would cause type mismatch if non-Button controls are used.

base/src/main/java/atlantafx/base/contro.general_idea: Switch from style classes to PseudoClasses for first/last state styling.
base/src/main/java/atlantafx/base/contro.why_exists: The new logic uses pseudoClassStateChanged(FIRST/LAST) instead of adding/removing style classes, requiring PseudoClass constants.

base/src/main/java/atlantafx/base/contro.general_idea: Add divider support between breadcrumbs via a factory.
base/src/main/java/atlantafx/base/contro.why_exists: The new implementation creates and inserts divider nodes based on getDividerFactory(), which is a new API contract.

base/src/main/java/atlantafx/base/contro.general_idea: Refactor layout logic to center nodes vertically and handle overlapping arrows.
base/src/main/java/atlantafx/base/contro.why_exists: The layoutChildren method is rewritten to calculate nodeY for vertical centering and handle arrow overlap, changing the visual layout behavior.

base/src/main/java/atlantafx/base/contro.general_idea: Update event handler registration to use BreadCrumbItem's childrenModificationEvent.
base/src/main/java/atlantafx/base/contro.why_exists: TreeItem.childrenModificationEvent() is replaced with BreadCrumbItem.childrenModificationEvent() to match the new model.

Add computeMinWidth override for proper sizing.

base/src/main/java/atlantafx/base/contro.before:
/** * The Popover control provides detailed information about an owning node in a * popup window. The popup window has a very lightweight appearance (no default * window decorations) and an arrow pointing at the owner. Due to the nature of * popup windows the Popover will move around with the parent window when the * user drags it. *

* The Popover can be detached from the owning node by dragging it away from the * owner. It stops displaying an arrow and starts displaying a title and a close * icon. */
base/src/main/java/atlantafx/base/contro.after:
/** * A control that is intended to provide detailed information about * an owning node in a popup window. The popup window has a lightweight * appearance (no default window decorations) and an arrow pointing at the owner. * Due to the nature of popup windows the Popover will move around with the parent * window when the user drags it. * *

The Popover can be detached from the owning node by dragging it away from the * owner. It stops displaying an arrow and starts displaying a title and a close * icon. * *

Example * * 

{@code
 * var textFlow = new TextFlow(new Text("Some content"));
 * textFlow.setPrefWidth(300);
 *
 * var popover = new Popover(textFlow);
 * popover.setTitle("Title");
 *
 * var ownerLink = new Hyperlink("Show popover");
 * ownerLink.setOnAction(e -> popover.show(ownerLink));
 * }
*/
